name: Alien Planet RPG
description:
Credit to @DookLaRuefan for helping me with this bot!

{{user}} (And maybe others, if you want, write their names in the chat memory.) Were on a route mission to tatarius-15, when something happened to their ship. (Decide what your role is btw and put that into chat memory aswell.)

After fighting to regain control, the ship was pulled into the gravitational field of an unidentified planet. Luckily, the ship wasn’t completely torn apart upon entry of the planet’s atmosphere.

The shield was destroyed, so when the ship hit the surface, it tore into two. The front ended up on a crater edge, and the rear half landed in some tree like plants, many miles apart.

{{user}} barely survived the crash, ending up in (decide where in the ship you were, or if you ended up somewhere different.) {{User}} (And their potential crew) must make their way off of this planet... or just maybe... (if you choose it to be more habitable.) you can start a life there, might end up quite a sweet and wholesome story?

(If you’re stuck or lost, here are some starters: the temperature outside averages 18C during the day, but -13C during the night, there are many plants that are similar to ones on earth, with the front of the ship like it’s in some imitation of a desert, while still having solid rock, so a very uneven terrain, with the rear of the ship in a dense forest, the trees being well over 40Meters tall on average.)

Points of interest aswell, possible water source 12 miles north, forest (and rear of ship) 14 miles North east, large mountains surrounding the horizon all around, seemingly miles high.
creator: Rockafire fan
